reasoning: get_local_food returns 22905 MAFF GI items, capped at 500 with proper truncation_note. Bilingual ja/en, prefecture codes, source_url, official translation. Excellent traceability. reasoning: get_traditional_arts returns 183 items led by UNESCO ICH (Bunraku, Kabuki, Chakkirako, Hayachine Kagura). Strong qid, designation, inscription_year, unesco_id, source_url. reasoning: 富士 query nails it: 富士山 (prominence 1.0) ranked #1 with full kinds, 4 heritage_designations, coords, OSM hours. 富士五湖 #2. Sengen shrines follow. Hokusai/Miho-no-Matsubara not in top excerpt but 富士山 World Heritage cluster is well covered.
